narrative: Japan FinMin Katayama warns of decisive action as JPY tests multi-decade lows — USD/JPY holds at 163.78 despite 1.7% headline CPI beat; 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid while moderate options put skew (25d RR -1.36) signals hedging demand for an intervention-led reversal. Geopolitical risk from Houthi tanker attacks firmed the dollar earlier: gold -0.10%; equities -1.21%; DXY -0.06%; VIX 18.7. Watch the next BoE meeting and BoJ meeting July 31.
